packApplicability.reason: Spring Boot 2.x was not detected. This pack targets Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x migrations.

readiness.summary: Pack mismatch: Spring Boot 2.x was not detected. This pack targets Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x migrations.

productionFindings.recommendation: Declare Spring Boot version explicitly in Maven or Gradle metadata.

productionFindings.recommendation: Migrate Java EE imports to Jakarta equivalents for Spring Boot 3.

evidence.name: OpenRewrite dry-run readiness
evidence.note: OpenRewrite execution is available through transform --engine openrewrite when Maven or Gradle execution is available.

checks.name: Compilation
checks.output:
ethods will be blocked in a future release unless native access is enabled


Welcome to Gradle 7.6.2!

Here are the highlights of this release:
 - Added support for Java 19.
 - Introduced `--rerun` flag for individual task rerun.
 - Improved dependency block for test suites to be strongly typed.
 - Added a pluggable system for Java toolchains provisioning.

For more details see https://docs.gradle.org/7.6.2/release-notes.html

To honour the JVM settings for this build a single-use Daemon process will be forked. See https://docs.gradle.org/7.6.2/userguide/gradle_daemon.html#sec:disabling_the_daemon.
Daemon will be stopped at the end of the build 

FAILURE: Build failed with an exception.

* What went wrong:
Could not open cp_settings generic class cache for settings file '~/<workspace> (~/.gradle/caches/7.6.2/scripts/5ahqfh7a8ailxfcfr6uahx9so).
> BUG! exception in phase 'semantic analysis' in source unit '_BuildScript_' Unsupported class file major version 69

* Try:
> Run with --stacktrace option to get the stack trace.
> Run with --info or --debug option to get more log output.
> Run with --scan to get full insights.

* Get more help at https://help.gradle.org

BUILD FAILED in 21s

nextActions.title: Plan javax to Jakarta namespace migration
nextActions.reason: Modern Spring Boot and Hibernate migration paths require Jakarta namespace readiness.

nextActions.title: Select the applicable modernization pack
nextActions.reason: Spring Boot 2.x was not detected. This pack targets Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x migrations.

nextActions.title: Review JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 migration risks
nextActions.reason: JUnit 5 readiness depends on explicit review of JUnit 4 APIs, runners, dependencies, and Vintage engine assumptions.

nextActions.title: Validate the Spring Boot 3 upgrade path
nextActions.reason: Spring Boot version evidence determines whether the Spring Boot 2 to 3 pack can support migration planning.

findingDetails.policy: Representative findings are capped at 300 entries for benchmark report JSON. Full counts are preserved in findingSummary.
